title: beyond the barrier
description: extend minecrafts terrain gen to 2.147 billion while adding the farlands back
body:
have you ever wanted a mod that extends terrain generation to the 32 bit integer limit? well this is the mod for you. on top of doing that, it also removes minecraft betas farlands patch so they generate in their old position too.

this mod is compatible with any minecraft version beyond 1.16 as long as you have fabric 0.14 or higher

THANK YOU TO MAXIUMG9 FOR PORTING THIS TO FABRIC. i made the jar mod but couldnt obfuscate it so he made this a fabric mod. so thank you to him :P

![farlands added back with the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/245887d887cd78f191e709536c83ef170fd34a87.png)

![world border at 2147483000 blocks away (not the 32 bit limit, game would crash if i loaded those chunks)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f1ac6e80376091742ee0745667215b8ebafff5.png)
